svg.text: Responsive breakpoints, column grids, and layout patterns for SVG wireframes.
16px margins, 12px gutter, single column layout. 4-column grid for sub-layouts.
32px margins, 24px gutter, 12-column grid. Content max-width varies by layout pattern.
Four common patterns for adapting mobile content to desktop width.

g.text: Detail views, results screens, main + contextual sidebar
List views, dashboards, item browsers. Cards go from 1-col (mobile) to 2-3 cols
Focused flows — forms, wizards, surveys. Keep attention narrow.
Filtered views, settings. Converts mobile's horizontal pills to persistent vertical nav.
Core principle: Desktop expands the mobile layout. It never rearranges the information hierarchy.

svg.text: Grid & Layout System — Generic Template v1.0 — Breakpoints, grids, and four layout patterns
